form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start favourite; was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by 0.5 len at Warracknabeal Bm66 April 4 over 1200m defeating Olivia's Scandal carrying 60kg at $1.55.
